title: sorghum oryzetorum
intro: Sorghum oryzetorum, also known as broomcorn sorghum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Sorghum oryzetorum include its potential to help manage diabetes, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and provide relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Sorghum oryzetorum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
